name: Lemon Curd Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the yeast in warm water (105°F-115°F) until dissolved.
2. Add sugar to the yeast mixture and mix well.
3. Warm sour cream; add it to the yeast mixture along with lemon rind and salt.
4. Beat in first egg measure, then incorporate enough flour for a soft dough.
5. Beat butter into the dough. Turn onto floured board and knead smooth (6-7 minutes).
6. Place dough in lightly buttered bowl. Cover tightly with plastic wrap. Let rise doubled in bulk (45-60 minutes).
7. Punch down dough.
8. Roll out on floured board to form an 18-inch x 12-inch rectangle.
9. Spread lemon curd over dough, leaving a 3/4-inch border around all sides.
10. Carefully roll up the dough and slice into 3 1/2-inch thick pieces.
11. Place rolls in greased pie pan (8 inches) in a circle.
12. Let rise for about 30 minutes.
13. Preheat oven to 360°F.
14. Lightly beat second egg measure, then brush cake with beaten egg and sprinkle chopped nuts.
15. Bake for about 30 minutes.
